decision: Use two local H100 GPUs as logical hosts for the current Phase 3 proxy gate; defer real NVIDIA/AMD/Mac validation.

deferred_requirements.reason: current proxy uses deterministic target fixture; real frontier target-model loading/parity remains future validation
AMD GPU node is not present on this development machine
Apple Silicon Mac is not present on this development machine
local mTLS/auth is sufficient for the proxy gate but not product keying evidence
local partition fencing/recovery is sufficient for the proxy gate but not real distributed partition evidence

warnings: Phase 3 endpoint artifact is represented by a packaged proxy summary; formal G3 validation remains deferred.

evidence_checks.evidence: activation-transfer, split-pipeline, and MoE probes span cuda:0->cuda:1 logical hosts
evidence_checks.name: h100-two-logical-hosts

evidence_checks.evidence: local mTLS, missing-client-cert rejection, bearer auth rejection, and plan-hash rejection
evidence_checks.name: endpoint-security

evidence_checks.evidence: local retry-after, cancellation, timeout, partition fence, and partition recovery
evidence_checks.name: failure-semantics

evidence_checks.evidence: lifecycle cleanup releases all local resources with single-owner accounting

evidence_checks.evidence: activation-transfer, split-pipeline, MoE parity, and target-fixture execution probes pass
